alignments.candidate_evidence: No evidence of rail/train operations certification or specialized rail safety training in candidate profile.
alignments.job_requirement: Abgeschlossene Qualifizierung als Zugpersonal (z.B. Zugführer:in/Zugchef:in) mit Qualifikation für Bremsproben und Waggonprüfungen

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices in commercial operations scaling; experience with transformation programs and process design; strong stakeholder management and operational excellence documented.
alignments.job_requirement: Oversee safe transport of passengers across the entire route; be primary contact for passengers and deliver excellent service; manage ticket control and support ticket sales

alignments.candidate_evidence: No evidence of hands-on technical operations, vehicle maintenance, safety compliance inspection, or infrastructure/depot-level operational work.
alignments.job_requirement: Independently conduct technical inspections (vehicle safety checks, brake tests) and escort shunting/parking operations

alignments.candidate_evidence: Demonstrated process design, transformation program leadership, and operational improvement at scale through Google Devices work.
alignments.job_requirement: Contribute to continuous improvement of service and operations processes

alignments.candidate_evidence: No evidence of shift work, overnight travel, or willingness to work non-standard hours documented in profile.
alignments.job_requirement: Shift work including nights, weekends, holidays; overnight stays during long-distance operations; willingness to travel nationwide

alignments.candidate_evidence: Native German speaker; professional English; some tech fluency implied by Google background.
alignments.job_requirement: Very good German language skills; first English skills beneficial; comfort with PC tools

gaps.gap: Rail-certified train crew qualifications (Zugführer/Zugchef certification, brake test and wagon inspection qualifications)
gaps.mitigation: JD explicitly states 'no career changers' and requires pre-qualified, trained train crew. Candidate would require months of formal rail training and licensing before role-readiness.

gaps.gap: Hands-on technical operations and vehicle safety inspection experience
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has process and transformation background, not depot/infrastructure technical operations. Brake testing and wagon inspection are specialized compliance skills with no clear crossover.

gaps.gap: No demonstrated shift-work or overnight travel history
gaps.mitigation: Role requires routine overnight absences and non-standard hours. Candidate's profile does not confirm willingness or past experience with this operational cadence.

gaps.gap: Operations background is commercial/product-driven, not operations-intensive field logistics
gaps.mitigation: Google Devices experience is process and transformation focused. FlixTrain role is operationally intensive hands-on passenger and safety management.

hard_blockers.evidence: JD: 'Achtung: Wir bieten keinen Quereinstieg und keine Ausbildung für diese Position an, sondern suchen nach vorqualifizierten und ausgebildeten Zugchef:innen/ Zugführer:innen für den Fernverkehr.' (We offer no career transition and no training for this position; we seek pre-qualified and trained train crew.) Candidate has no rail certification, formal train crew training, or any documented relevant credentials.

output.level_rationale: Rail crew role requiring 0–2 years' entry-level operational experience post-certification; no management scope; hands-on passenger safety and technical inspection duties; operational-execution focus with no strategic, leadership, or seniority signal. Typical L3 operational role in transport/logistics sector.
output.summary: Flix is hiring a certified, pre-qualified train crew member (Zugchef/in) for long-distance passenger rail operations in Germany. The JD explicitly bars career changers and requires existing rail certifications (brake testing, wagon inspection, crew licenses) and hands-on technical operations. Candidate is a Strategy and Operations leader with eight years at Google; no rail certification, technical operations background, or demonstrated shift-work history. Hard blocker: JD mandates pre-qualified train crew and explicitly excludes career transitions and training. Role is operational-execution-focused (L3) and falls entirely outside candidate's target family and skill base. Recommend skip."
uncertainties: Candidate's willingness to pursue rail crew certification and career transition not explored in profile.
Whether candidate has any adjacent transport, logistics, or operations-intensive field experience outside Google.
